title: angiopteris fokiensis var. muralis
intro: Angiopteris fokiensis var. muralis is a variety of the Angiopteris plant, also known as the Chinese water fern or giant fern, which is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Marattiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of conditions including fever, cough, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Angiopteris fokiensis var. muralis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
